movie.actors: Dolph Lundgren, Darla Taylor, Bill Bellamy, Aleks Paunovic
movie.plot: Assigned to recover sensitive stolen data, a gruff FBI agent goes undercover as a kindergarten teacher, but the school's liberal, politically correct environment is more than he bargained for.
movie.title: Kindergarten Cop 2
movie.writer: David H. Steinberg (screenplay), Timothy Harris (based on the film written by), Murray Salem (based on the film written by), Murray Salem (story), Herschel Weingrod (based on the film written by)
